name: Adjustable Dumbbell 25lbs - All In Motion™: Steel & Plastic, Single Piece
description:
This 25lb adjustable dumbbell is designed to help you tone your upper body and build strength. Equipped with multiple weight options, this adjustable dumbbell is the perfect addition to your home gym. Best of all, the space-saving design with a dumbbell tray allows for convenient storage and carrying.

All in Motion™: Made for every move, priced for every day.
